resources.string: Use "Share" Feature to provide a YouTube link
Wlan disconnected! Downloads cancelled to protect your mobile data volume 🔒
Scan failed! Multicast is not possible in your current network

You can manage your favorite network players here. You can also add a custom URL to include a device in the automatic scan. Please use the URL of the device’s media player service. If you’re unsure, check the device’s user manual.
 Examples:
 - Kodi
 http://192.168.178.80:1379/
 - Samsung Smart TVs (UE series)
 http://192.168.178.80:9197/dmr
